contexts.context: ...might have arrived in the meantime.  But the green <mark>shutters</mark> were closed and there was no one about apart...
...stuck it in the chink between the door´s <mark>shutters</mark>, and he was still barking as I shut...
...was something consoling to hold on to.      The green <mark>shutters</mark> on the door at Kirchstetten were closed, and...
